name: Pocket Colposcope from Calla Health
description: The Pocket Colposcope has the form factor of a tampon with comparable resolution and field-of-view to a state-of-the-art digital colposcope. The design is unique compared to traditional clinical colposcopes and redesigned, low-cost colposcopes, because it re-imagines the way a gynecological exam is performed. Rather than visualizing the cervix from outside the speculum (which colposcopes do), the Pocket Colposcope is used inside the speculum, enabling a close-up view of the cervix (3 cm vs. 30 cm away) with consumer-grade white and green LEDs and a 5-megapixel camera.
keyFeatures:
Resting Design - The Pocket Colposcope is designed to rest on the speculum during exams, removing the need for an external stand.
Button Placement: Buttons are placed along the top of the handle for intuitive toggling between LED light and zoom settings.

Green LEDs: Designed for visualizing cervix vasculature.

• Green LEDs: Designed for visualizing cervix vasculature.
